mapper.select:
SELECT DATE(trade_time) AS name, SUM(amount) AS value
SELECT DATE(trade_time) AS name, SUM(amount) AS value
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(trade_time, '%Y-%m') AS name, SUM(amount) AS value
SELECT YEAR(trade_time) AS name, SUM(amount) AS value
FROM fortune_bill WHERE deleted = 0 AND book_id = #{billTrendsQuery.bookId} AND include = TRUE AND bill_type = #{billTrendsQuery.billType}
AND trade_time >= DATE_SUB(#{billTrendsQuery.timePoint}, INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND trade_time < DATE_ADD(#{billTrendsQuery.timePoint}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
AND trade_time >= DATE_SUB(#{billTrendsQuery.timePoint}, INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND trade_time < DATE_ADD(#{billTrendsQuery.timePoint}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
AND trade_time >= DATE_SUB(#{billTrendsQuery.timePoint}, INTERVAL 12 MONTH) AND trade_time < DATE_ADD(#{billTrendsQuery.timePoint}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
GROUP BY name ORDER BY name ASC

SELECT date(trade_time) AS name, SUM(amount) AS value
SELECT date(trade_time) AS name, SUM(amount) AS value
SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', trade_time) AS name, SUM(amount) AS value
SELECT strftime('%Y', trade_time) AS name, SUM(amount) AS value
FROM fortune_bill WHERE deleted = 0 AND book_id = #{billTrendsQuery.bookId} AND include = 1 AND bill_type = #{billTrendsQuery.billType}
AND trade_time >= date(#{billTrendsQuery.timePoint}, '-6 day') AND trade_time < date(#{billTrendsQuery.timePoint}, '+1 day')
AND trade_time >= date(#{billTrendsQuery.timePoint}, '-30 day') AND trade_time < date(#{billTrendsQuery.timePoint}, '+1 day')
AND trade_time >= date(#{billTrendsQuery.timePoint}, '-12 month') AND trade_time < date(#{billTrendsQuery.timePoint}, '+1 day')
GROUP BY name ORDER BY name ASC

sql.if: AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM fortune_category_relation cr WHERE cr.bill_id = b.bill_id AND cr.category_id IN #{item})
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM fortune_tag_relation tr WHERE tr.bill_id = b.bill_id AND tr.tag_id IN #{item})
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM fortune_category_relation cr WHERE cr.bill_id = b.bill_id AND cr.category_id IN #{item})
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM fortune_tag_relation tr WHERE tr.bill_id = b.bill_id AND tr.tag_id IN #{item})

mapper.select:
SELECT COALESCE(ft.tag_name, '未设置标签') AS name, SUM(b.amount) AS value FROM fortune_bill b LEFT JOIN fortune_tag_relation btr ON b.bill_id = btr.bill_id LEFT JOIN fortune_tag ft ON btr.tag_id = ft.tag_id WHERE b.include = TRUE AND b.bill_type = #{billType} AND b.deleted = 0
AND b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.title}, '%') AND b.trade_time <= CONCAT(#{query.endDate}, ' 23:59:59') GROUP BY ft.tag_id

SELECT COALESCE(ft.tag_name, '未设置标签') AS name, SUM(b.amount) AS value FROM fortune_bill b LEFT JOIN fortune_tag_relation btr ON b.bill_id = btr.bill_id LEFT JOIN fortune_tag ft ON btr.tag_id = ft.tag_id WHERE b.include = 1 AND b.bill_type = #{billType} AND b.deleted = 0
AND b.title LIKE '%' || #{query.title} || '%' AND b.trade_time <= #{query.endDate} || ' 23:59:59' GROUP BY ft.tag_id

SELECT COALESCE(p.payee_name, '未设置交易对象') AS name, SUM(b.amount) AS value, (SUM(b.amount) / SUM(SUM(b.amount)) OVER ()) * 100 AS percent FROM fortune_bill b LEFT JOIN fortune_payee p ON b.payee_id = p.payee_id WHERE b.include = TRUE AND b.bill_type = #{billType} AND b.deleted = 0
AND b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.title}, '%')
AND b.trade_time <= CONCAT(#{query.endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
GROUP BY b.payee_id

SELECT COALESCE(p.payee_name, '未设置交易对象') AS name, SUM(b.amount) AS value, CAST(SUM(b.amount) AS REAL) / (SELECT SUM(b2.amount) FROM fortune_bill b2 LEFT JOIN fortune_payee p2 ON b2.payee_id = p2.payee_id WHERE b2.include = 1 AND b2.bill_type = #{billType} AND b2.deleted = 0 AND b2.book_id = #{query.bookId} ) * 100 AS percent FROM fortune_bill b LEFT JOIN fortune_payee p ON b.payee_id = p.payee_id WHERE b.include = 1 AND b.bill_type = #{billType} AND b.deleted = 0
AND b.title LIKE '%' || #{query.title} || '%'
AND b.trade_time <= #{query.endDate} || ' 23:59:59'
GROUP BY b.payee_id
